contentBlocks.title: When do you need to convert grams to ounces?
contentBlocks.html:
Gram (g) is a metric mass unit equal to 1/1000 of a kilogram. Ounce (oz) is an imperial unit equal to 28.3495 grams. This conversion is essential for cooking, jewelry, postal weights, and nutrition.

American and British recipes use ounces for ingredients. Jewelry and precious metals are measured in troy ounces (31.1035 g). Postal services use ounces for letter weights.

Common examples: 100 g = 3.53 oz, 250 g = 8.82 oz, 500 g = 17.64 oz. A standard letter weighs about 5 g = 0.18 oz.

All calculations run locally in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.

contentBlocks.title: How does grams to ounces conversion work?
contentBlocks.html:
The avoirdupois ounce (standard US/UK) = 28.349523125 g exactly. To convert grams to ounces, divide by 28.3495.

Note: troy ounces (used for precious metals) = 31.1035 g. This converter uses avoirdupois ounces.

Quick mental math: divide grams by 28 for a rough estimate. 100 g ÷ 28 ≈ 3.6 oz.

contentBlocks.title: Practical tips
contentBlocks.html:
• Butter: 1 US stick = 4 oz = 113.4 g. 1 cup = 8 oz = 226.8 g.
  • Flour: 1 US cup = about 4.25 oz = 120 g.
  • Gold: 1 troy oz = 31.1035 g (different from regular ounces!).
  • 1 pound = 16 oz = 453.59 g.

items.question: How many grams is 1 ounce?
items.answer: 1 avoirdupois ounce = 28.3495 grams. 1 troy ounce (precious metals) = 31.1035 grams.

items.question: What is the difference between oz and troy oz?
items.answer: Avoirdupois oz = 28.35 g (everyday use). Troy oz = 31.10 g (gold, silver, precious metals). Troy ounces are about 9.7% heavier.

items.question: How do I convert a recipe from grams to ounces?
items.answer: Divide grams by 28.35. For example: 200 g flour = 7.05 oz.

items.question: How much does a letter weigh?
items.answer: A standard A4 sheet weighs about 5 g (0.18 oz). US first-class letter limit is 1 oz = 28.35 g.

items.question: Are calculations done locally?
items.answer: Yes. All calculations run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
